title: Development of a portable leaf photosynthesis and volatile organic compounds emission system
author: Jardine, Zorzanelli, et al.

steps.title: Thermal desorption GC–MS analysis of Less-P tubes
steps.instruction: After returning from the field, TD tubes were analyzed in an automated TD-GC–MS system as described in the methods. For this, the TD tubes were removed from Less-P manifold and placed in an appropriate tray in TD-GC–MS. Each tube sample requires roughly 50 min for analysis allowing a full light curve to be completed in 5 h. The concentrations in ppb for each monoterpene found in the sample was then calculated based on the most recent calibration. Emission rates of each monoterpene were then calculated based on the concentration, the leaf area, and the flow rate of air entering the leaf chamber.
